title: AxomRed's Falling Trees
description: A new mod for felling trees completely.
body:
### Functional
A mod for Minecraft. When breaking a tree, it breaks completely. A tree breaks only if it is broken with an axe-type tool or multi tool. The mod does not need any libraries, and, importantly, the mod is compatible with other mods.
### Updates
I will update the mod to the main versions. Basically (as a mod developer) I create mods on NeoForge, on versions when forge did not exist.
### Support me on DonationAlerts
